تفاصيل الصنع

品質

QUALITY FOR DISPLAY

Every detail is designed for visual impact and lasting display. Decorative wood, lacquered finishes, and collector-level presentation — built to be seen.

MATERIAL

Decorative Wood

Shaped and finished for visual display

FINISH

Lacquered Detail

Smooth lacquered surface with elegant detail work

PURPOSE

Display Only

Crafted exclusively for room decoration and collection

LENGTH

103 cm

Full-size decorative katana proportions

PACKAGING

Secure & Premium

Delivered safely in protective packaging

DELIVERY

Free Across Morocco

Delivered to your door at no extra cost

CARE GUIDE

KEEP IT PERFECT

Keep dry

Avoid moisture and humidity. Do not expose to rain or wet surfaces.

Clean gently

Wipe with a soft dry cloth. Avoid harsh chemicals or abrasive materials.

Display safely

Use a proper wall mount or display stand. Keep out of reach of children.

Handle with care

Hold by the handle when moving. Avoid impacts on the lacquered surface.

Free Delivery Across Morocco
Cash on Delivery
Quality Check Before Shipping
Secure Packaging

Decorative wooden katanas that embody the spirit of the Samurai legacy, honor and discipline. Your gate to Japanese tradition, designed for collectors and premium room decoration.

For decoration only. Not a real weapon.
